state_prompts:
## State: START
- **Description:** Navigate to Aureon page
- **Triggers:**
	1. If it is on the chrome homescreen
- **Actions:**
	1. Go to https://connect.aureon.com/front_end word for word
	2. TERMINATE AT THIS POINT

## State: ADDRESS_BAR
- **Description:** If on the Aureon page
- **Triggers:**
	1. If you see 'Please enter your address below'
- **Actions:**
	1. FOLLOW THESE INSTRUCTIONS CLOSELY
	2. Accept cookies first
	3. Type `%address%` into the input field
	4. Type `%zip_code%` into the input field
	5. Click the 'Go' button
	6. TERMINATE AT THIS POINT

## State: CONFIRM_ADDRESS
- **Description:** Confirm address location
- **Triggers:**
	1. If you see '*If you would like to update the location of your address please drag and drop the blue pin to the rooftop of your service address.'
- **Actions:**
	1. Scroll down
	2. Click the 'Next' button
	3. DON'T DO ANYTHING, JUST TERMINATE AT THIS POINT

## State: SERVICEABLE
- **Description:** Build your bundle
- **Triggers:**
	1. If you see 'Build your bundle'
- **Actions:**
	1. DON'T DO ANYTHING, JUST TERMINATE AT THIS POINT
- **End State:** serviceable_with_plans

## State: NO_SERVICE
- **Description:** Service not available - (e.g. 'Aureon does not currently have commercial services available in your area. We are able to work with partners throughout the United States to help support the data and network needs of businesses like yours. If you are interested in exploring our partner network options, please provide your contact information below. An Aureon expert will reach out to you regarding your request.')
- **Triggers:**
	1. If you see 'Aureon does not currently have commercial services available in your area. We are able to work with partners throughout the United States to help support the data and network needs of businesses like yours. If you are interested in exploring our partner network options, please provide your contact information below. An Aureon expert will reach out to you regarding your request.'
- **Actions:**
	1. DON'T DO ANYTHING, JUST TERMINATE AT THIS POINT
- **End State:** no_service
